title: The Strange Countess
director: Josef von Báky, Jürgen Roland, Ottokar Runze
writer: Robert A. Stemmle, Curt Hanno Gutbrod, Edgar Wallace
actors: Joachim Fuchsberger, Brigitte Grothum, Marianne Hoppe
plot: A girl is almost murdered, but no explainable motive can be found until a 20 year old murder is uncovered and linked to the case.
